form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 50-day let-up. First-up after 10 months second last of 8 at Nowra Bm74 on February 22 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Tai Lung carrying 59.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Wagga Bm82 on March 1 2025 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Dupride Star with 57kg at $8.50. Will need this run.

form.formComment: Last start ran last of 8 at Goulburn Bm74 on March 22 over 1600m, slow going 13 len behind Miss Stalwart carrying 60.5kg at $101. The run before that raced on the pace before fading to run last of 7 at Wagga Tompattoncup on February 28 over 1800m, 23 len behind Rocco Lini carrying 61.5kg at $61. Needs it longer.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly throughout the early stages of the event.
Held up for clear running from the 400m until approaching the 200m.
Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Stupendo.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation third of 10 at this track Bm66 October 30 over 1200m, 0.6 len behind Tidal Rush carrying 59kg at $5.50. First up last campaign second of 11 at Moruya Cl3 August 17 over 1020m, soft track; 2 len behind Vella's Best with 53.5kg at $4.40. Lightly raced mare set to deliver first-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and contacted Kappy's Angel.
Bumped on jumping with Throw One In.
Crowded on jumping between Yeah Mate and She's Hellbent.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming faded in the straight ran last of 9 at Canberra Bm65 on February 6 over 1000m, 6 len behind Keadool carrying 59.5kg at $10. Second run from a spell did the work up front then tired ran last of 8 at Canberra Open on April 3 over 1000m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Iowna Benz carrying 55kg at $61. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation when last of 9 at Hawkesbury Bm64 November 27 over 1800m, 29 len behind Forbidden Riff with 58.5kg at $18. First up last campaign second of 11 at Moruya Mdn July 21 over 1020m, soft track; 3 len behind Spice Baby carrying 58kg at $4.20. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made the crossing near the 1600m awkwardly.
Shifted out at the start and made contact with Allhallowtide.
Approaching the 1100m shifted outwards when hampered.
Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. Last start led to the turn then faded 5th of 9 at Stony Creek Bm62 on March 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Trak Chiller with 59kg at $2.35. Before that favourite; won by 0.8 len at Sale F&M Bm62 March 1 over 1112m in soft going defeating Sugar Schnapps carrying 58kg at $10. Tough mare who has to overcome the outside gate, each way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Returns from a 36-day let-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages when three wide without cover.
Near the 50m, when weakening, was eased from the heels of Sweet 'N' Spicy.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. First-up. Finished off last campaign third in a small field at Queanbeyan Bm66 October 27 over 1000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Oakeys Choice carrying 60kg at $5.50. Previously first up; fourth of 12 at Moruya Ctry Mdn-Sw July 11 over 1010m, soft track; 4 len behind Sir Franklin with 59kg at $8.50. Might be better off following this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. First-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and shifted in abruptly making contact with Esecutore.
On jumping, shifted out.
Began awkwardly, shifted in and contacted La Bella Bondi.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track Bm66 on March 30 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind All Adore with 58.5kg at $3.70. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a neck at this track Cl3 March 1 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Iowna Benz with 55.5kg at $4.60. Goes well here but will need luck from the draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping by Aegipan. After the 150m shifted out slightly.
Slow to begin. Raced four-wide throughout.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming ran last in a small field at this track Cl3 on March 1 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Christmas Star carrying 57kg at $15. Second-up gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 9 at Wagga Bm66 on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 0.6 len behind Xspiritous with 58.5kg at $18. Rates highly. Fitter now and is among the leading hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after straightening eased outwards when awkwardly placed on heels.
On jumping shifted out and bumped O'Invincible.
On jumping, shifted in.
Shifted out at the start and contacted Into The Fire.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 10 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Ctry Bm66 on March 23 over 1150m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Cupid's Kiss carrying 58.5kg at $3.40. The run before that favourite; won by 2 len at Goulburn Bm58 February 27 over 1100m on a rain affected track defeating Shoreman carrying 60kg at $4.20. Better than the last run and worth another chance.
